title: Crispy Chicken Skillet with Peruvian Flair
description: A flavorful and spicy skillet dish featuring crispy chicken, potent spices, and a hint of Peruvian flair.
instructions: Season the chicken with peruvian chili powder, salt, and pepper.
Heat the oil in the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the crispy onions and potent cilantro to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the crispy chicken skillet hot, garnished with additional potent cilantro if desired.
